L

LabeledCheckBox - Class in microui.component
A composite component that combines a CheckBox with a TextView to create a labeled checkbox.
LabeledCheckBox() - Constructor for class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Constructs a LabeledCheckBox with an empty label.
LabeledCheckBox(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Constructs a LabeledCheckBox with specified position and dimensions.
LabeledCheckBox(String) - Constructor for class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Constructs a LabeledCheckBox with the specified label text.
launch() - Method in class microui.core.effect.Ripples
Launches a new ripple animation from the current mouse position.
LayoutManager - Class in microui.layout
Abstract base class for layout managers that handle positioning and sizing of components within a container.
LayoutManager() - Constructor for class microui.layout.LayoutManager
 
layoutParams() - Method in record class microui.core.base.Container.Entry
Returns the value of the layoutParams record component.
LayoutParams - Interface in microui.layout
Marker interface for layout parameters.
LEAVE - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Mouse leave event (EDGE).
LEAVE_LONG - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Leave long event (EDGE).
LEFT - Enum constant in enum class microui.component.MenuButton.DirectionMode
Always place sub-menus to the left.
LEFT - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.TextEditorModel.Direction
Left direction, typically used for moving cursor left.
length() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Returns the length of the text content.
length() - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Returns the length of the text content.
LerpedColor - Class in microui.core.style
A concrete implementation of AbstractLerpedColor that uses a condition to control the direction of color interpolation.
LerpedColor(AbstractColor, AbstractColor, BooleanSupplier) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.LerpedColor
Constructs a new LerpedColor with specified start and end colors, and a condition that controls animation direction.
LerpedLoopColor - Class in microui.core.style
A continuously looping interpolated color that automatically cycles between start and end colors.
LerpedLoopColor(AbstractColor, AbstractColor) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.LerpedLoopColor
Constructs a new looping interpolated color with the specified start and end colors.
LinearAxisLayout - Class in microui.layout
Abstract base class for linear axis layouts that arrange components along a single axis.
LinearAxisLayout() - Constructor for class microui.layout.LinearAxisLayout
 
LinearAxisLayoutParams - Class in microui.layout
Abstract base class for layout parameters used in linear axis layouts.
LinearAxisLayoutParams(float, int, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.LinearAxisLayoutParams
Constructs a new LinearAxisLayoutParams with specified weight and alignment.
LinearLayout - Class in microui.layout
Linear layout manager that arranges components in a single row or column.
LinearLayout() - Constructor for class microui.layout.LinearLayout
Constructs a LinearLayout with default vertical orientation.
LinearLayout(boolean) - Constructor for class microui.layout.LinearLayout
Constructs a LinearLayout with specified orientation.
LinearLayoutParams - Class in microui.layout
Layout parameters for LinearLayout.
LinearLayoutParams(float) - Constructor for class microui.layout.LinearLayoutParams
Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and center alignment.
LinearLayoutParams(float, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.LinearLayoutParams
Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and uniform alignment.
LinearLayoutParams(float, int, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.LinearLayoutParams
Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and alignment values.
LinearRangeControl - Class in microui.core
Abstract base class for linear range control components (sliders, scrollbars).
LinearRangeControl(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.LinearRangeControl
Constructs a LinearRangeControl with specified position and dimensions.
listen() - Method in class microui.event.AbstractEventSystem
Updates event detection state.
listen() - Method in class microui.event.InteractionHandler
Updates event detection and dispatches events to registered listeners.
listen() - Method in class microui.feedback.Tooltip
Updates tooltip state and manages visibility.
Listener - Interface in microui.event
Functional interface for event listeners in the MicroUI framework.
load(String) - Method in class microui.core.ImageBuffer
Loads an image from a file path.
LONG_PRESS - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Long press event (EDGE).
